completion: Runtime JWT secret on wg-prod-1 is rotated through a redacted secret-safe path after the prior exposure.
SMTP credential presence is verified by metadata only and no secret values are stored in Bureau, GitHub or chat.
Public login is enabled only after readiness preflight passes with AUTH_LOG_MAGIC_TOKEN disabled.
A real Magic-Link delivery is confirmed externally without token leakage in logs.
goal: Track the remaining production-safe rollout work for SMTP-backed public Magic-Link login on wg-prod-1, including remediation of the exposed JWT runtime secret before login activation.

metadata.lifecycle_repair: Aligned initiative state with blocked task state after Bureau queue closeout PR #323.
metadata.safety_boundary: No public login activation until SMTP delivery is configured, JWT runtime secret is rotated, readiness preflight passes, and external delivery is confirmed. No secret values in Bureau, GitHub or chat.
metadata.waiting_reason: The only registered rollout task is blocked on secret-safe SMTP credential availability and JWT rotation; no runtime/public-login action is authorized while blocked.

title: Weltgewebe public login production rollout safety
